pages.scene: Sofia arrives in Barcelona and is immediately captivated by the colorful streets and the sight of a local artist painting.
pages.authoredNarration: Sofia bounced through the Barcelona streets, her red shoes clicking with excitement. "Wow! What's all the fuss about?" she asked her mom.

pages.scene: Sofia visits the Sagrada Família and is inspired by the intricate architecture, which she draws in her notebook with her dinosaur-themed pencil.
pages.authoredNarration: Sofia the Small Mouse, wearing her favorite dinosaur hat,

pages.scene: Sofia explores the Park Güell and finds a hidden spot where she can draw her favorite dinosaur in the grass under the colorful arches.
pages.authoredNarration: Sofia danced down the winding path,

pages.scene: Sofia tries a delicious Spanish meal at a small tapas restaurant and is surprised by the flavors, which she tries to capture in her drawings.
pages.authoredNarration: Sofia sat at a tiny table by the window in a cozy tapas restaurant in Barcelona's famous Gothic Quarter. She ordered a plate of churros and a rich, dark hot chocolate, and took a sip with a happy sigh. The first bite of the crispy fried dough sticks was like a party in her mouth – sweet, crunchy, and utterly delicious!

pages.scene: Sofia walks through the streets of Barcelona in the evening and is amazed by the lights and the city’s peaceful atmosphere, which she draws in her notebook.
pages.authoredNarration: Sofia zoomed her scooter through the Barcelona streets, the sunset casting a golden glow over the towering Sagrada Família, a giant basilica in the distance. "Wow!" she squealed, "I'm almost there!"

days.label: 2 nights before
days.light: Catch early-morning light; dim lights ~30 min earlier each evening
days.advice: Bright light at bedside helps reset your clock earlier for morning.
days.adviceIfRough: Gentle dim light and quiet sleep tonight to support adjustment.

days.label: 1 night before
days.light: Catch early-morning light; dim lights ~30 min earlier each evening
days.advice: Child needs calm evening wind-down, dim light, no screens, then gentle bedtime routine.
days.adviceIfRough: Offer extra comfort, quiet room, maybe a soft pat on cheek, no extra demands.

days.label: ✈️ Flight day
days.nap: Nap on the plane only during the destination's night-time
days.light: Set watches to destination time on takeoff
days.advice: This is a great time to rest in darkness.
days.adviceIfRough: Even better: dim night lights gently.

days.label: Night 1 in Barcelona
days.nap: Short nap OK 13:00–13:30 local · ≤30 min, none after 15:00
days.light: Bright light first thing 7–9am local · dim screens & lights after dinner
days.advice: Your child's natural rhythm is settling in.
days.adviceIfRough: Last night was bumpy, so go a little slower tonight with extra cuddles — it settles within a few days.

days.label: Night 2 in Barcelona
days.nap: Short nap OK 13:00–13:30 local · ≤30 min, none after 15:00
days.light: Bright light first thing 7–9am local · dim screens & lights after dinner
days.advice: Keep dim lights and soft sounds to gently guide sleep in Barcelona's rhythm.
days.adviceIfRough: Offer a calm wind-down and avoid bright lights now.

days.label: Night 3 in Barcelona
days.nap: Try to skip naps today — push through to tonight's target
days.light: Bright light first thing 7–9am local · dim screens & lights after dinner
days.advice: Today's gentle night routine: dim lights, quiet room, warm bath.
days.adviceIfRough: Last night was bumpy, so go a little slower tonight with extra cuddles — it settles within a few days.

days.label: Night 4 in Barcelona
days.nap: Try to skip naps today — push through to tonight's target
days.light: Bright light first thing 7–9am local · dim screens & lights after dinner
days.advice: Tonight's calm, steady routine is nudging their body clock the right way — keep it gentle.
days.adviceIfRough: Last night was bumpy, so go a little slower tonight with extra cuddles — it settles within a few days.

days.label: ✈️ Fly home
days.nap: Nap on the plane only during the destination's night-time
days.light: Soak up afternoon/evening light 4–7pm local · keep the morning dim
days.advice: Fly home tonight to reset your clock gently with morning light and calm evening rest.
days.adviceIfRough: Keep lights dim and avoid strong daytime cues tonight.

days.label: Home night 1
days.nap: Short nap OK 13:00–13:30 local · ≤30 min, none after 15:00
days.light: Soak up afternoon/evening light 4–7pm local · keep the morning dim
days.advice: Gentle blue light in morning, warm evening calm, short nap okay.
days.adviceIfRough: If last night was rough, keep tonight quiet and reassuring — their clock is finding home again.

days.label: Home night 2
days.nap: Short nap OK 13:00–13:30 local · ≤30 min, none after 15:00
days.light: Soak up afternoon/evening light 4–7pm local · keep the morning dim
days.advice: Gentle wake-up, no extra sleep, dim lights, wind-down routine.
days.adviceIfRough: Offer short nap, extra calm time, maybe a little dim light and quiet.

days.label: Home night 3
days.nap: Try to skip naps today — push through to tonight's target
days.light: Soak up afternoon/evening light 4–7pm local · keep the morning dim
days.advice: Tonight is home night 3 - bright morning light and calm dim evening help your body adjust smoothly.
days.adviceIfRough: Skip the extra bright light and keep the room dimmer for gentler adjustment.

days.label: Back to normal
days.advice: Back home, a steady dim-light routine helps them slide back into their normal sleep.
